chunks.content:
Article: EoTV Episode 25 an overlooked part in the real world
[]: EoTV Episode 25- an overlooked part in 'the real world'?             Quote Post by Lacissal » Mon Jun 28, 2021 7:19 am I did a rewatch of the series recently, as well as assembling a source compilation of statements by Eva staff on the production of the original planned Episode 25 before scheduling issues required it to be ditched, and one scene stuck out which I don't think I've really seen discussed. Most people here will be familiar with the scenes from the 'real world' we see in Ep 25- Ritsuko face down dead in the LCL, Misato bleeding out on the ground, Unit 02 in the fetal position in the GeoFront lake with Asuka in the cockpit, Gendo going to fetch Rei III, that we see again in the first half of EoE, but there's another scene which seems to be dialogue happening in 'the real world' rather than Instrumentality. For reference it's around 10.20 into the episode, just after the half-way eye catch and the teleops stating 'the Instrumentality of Hearts and Souls begins' Gendo: "No, it is not that we are returning to nothingness. We are only restoring everything to its original state. We are only returning to our mother, who has been lost to this world. All souls will become one and find eternal peace. That is all there is to it." Misato: "And that's the Instrumentality Project?" Ritsuko:"That's Right. There is always a void, a part that has been lost to our hearts. [more teleops] Every single person fears that darkness in their heart and lives life trying to escape from it, to banish it. Even though it will never disappear as long as we remain human." Misato; "That's why you're going to bundle all human souls together, so we can compensate for the void in each other?! And you're just going to do thid to everyone?! Mind your own business! That's nothing more than a conspiracy to deceive us!" Ritsuko: "But you've been wishing for it to happen too."

[]: Re: EoTV Episode 25- an overlooked part in 'the real world'?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jun 28, 2021 10:01 am that is definitely a very important scene I for one thing believe Misato & Ritsuko shot each other

Article: EoTV Episode 25 an overlooked part in the real world
 in 'the real world'?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jun 28, 2021 10:01 am that is definitely a very important scene I for one thing believe Misato & Ritsuko shot each other in this timeline.

[]: Re: EoTV Episode 25- an overlooked part in 'the real world'?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Mon Jun 28, 2021 9:34 pm Shinji feeling the start of Instrumentality comes before the eyecatch, this dialogue comes afterwards. Assuming the events shown in ep25 are in chronological order, which makes sense, this would be happening inside Instrumentality during the chaos that ensued immediately following Third Impact, when everyone was confused and terrified, before they became one and settled down [shown in the like 700 different still frames near the end of Komm Susser Tod in EoE]. We have no reason to believe this is an alternate timeline yet, and maybe the series and movie actually are the same timeline but from different perspectives, which is a theme of the TV ending after all.
